verses.text: Zelophehad's daughters ask for an inheritance. The daughters. They seek their father's name.
Zelophehad's daughters ask for an inheritance. The daughters. They seek their father's name.
Zelophehad's daughters ask for an inheritance. The daughters. They seek their father's name.
Zelophehad's daughters ask for an inheritance. The daughters. They seek their father's name.
God grants it: they shall have a possession. Granted. God upholds the just request.
God grants it: they shall have a possession. Granted. God upholds the just request.
God grants it: they shall have a possession. Granted. God upholds the just request.
A law of inheritance is given for such cases. The law. Daughters may inherit.
A law of inheritance is given for such cases. The law. Daughters may inherit.
A law of inheritance is given for such cases. The law. Daughters may inherit.
A law of inheritance is given for such cases. The law. Daughters may inherit.
God bids Moses view the land he may not enter. The view. He sees but enters not.
God bids Moses view the land he may not enter. The view. He sees but enters not.
God bids Moses view the land he may not enter. The view. He sees but enters not.
Moses asks God to set a man over the congregation. A shepherd. He cares for the people's future.
Moses asks God to set a man over the congregation. A shepherd. He cares for the people's future.
Moses asks God to set a man over the congregation. A shepherd. He cares for the people's future.
God appoints Joshua, full of the Spirit, before Eleazar. Joshua. A new leader is named.

Moses lays hands on Joshua and charges him. Commissioned. The succession is sealed.
Moses lays hands on Joshua and charges him. Commissioned. The succession is sealed.
